programs.title: A Bride's Nightmare
programs.desc: (2021) Thriller with Brittany Underwood. On her wedding day, Leah is kidnapped by her fiancé's ex-girlfriend. But is it obsession, or a desperate attempt to protect her from a hidden danger?

programs.title: The Daughter Stalker
programs.desc: (2020) Twist-laden thriller with Karynn Moore. When her wealthy estranged sister dies, Carly is shocked to be named guardian of her daughter. But someone's plans didn't include a long-lost relative...

programs.title: The Wedding Stalker
programs.desc: A dressmaker longs to have a wedding of her own with the man of her dreams. And she will stop at nothing to have it - even if it means killing his bride to be.

programs.title: Another Mother
programs.desc: (2020) Psychological thriller with Alex McKenna. A woman gets engaged to a man with a young daughter, but their happiness is threatened by the girl's biological mother, who resorts to deadly measures.

programs.title: Dangerous Bestie
programs.desc: (2018) Tense thriller starring Rosslyn Luke. Happy to be reunited at first, a woman quickly realises her former best friend has sinister plans to hold her and her family hostage.

programs.title: Summer House
programs.desc: (2008) Mystery-thriller starring Lindsay Price. A woman inherits a family summer house haunted by a centuries-old curse, leading to a series of strange events that threaten her life.
